description_long: This is a large, four-engine military-style transport airplane with a robust fuselage and a high-mounted straight wing configuration. The exterior features a dark color scheme with intricate tan and blue decorative patterns along the fuselage and tail, giving it a distinctive appearance. The wings are broad and straight, equipped with four visible turboprop engines mounted forward of the wing's leading edge. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with multiple wheels visible beneath the fuselage and wings. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage, with a multi-windowed, enclosed design typical of transport aircraft.
description: A large, four-engine military-style transport airplane with a high-mounted straight wing, dark decorative livery, and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, high-mounted wings with four engines, and decorative patterns along the body and tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad wingspan, four turboprop engines, and the forward cockpit windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the silhouette of the fuselage, wing, and tail, with less visible detail due to lighting.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail section, horizontal stabilizers, and the width of the wings with engine nacelles visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with multiple main and nose gear units visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
